##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=James Shigley
##DESCRIPTION=Dark green aggregates of blocky crystals, associated with quartz, muscovite, and arrojadite-(BaNa) (R160077)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Na_1.05_Ca_0.07_Mn^2+^_0.29_ □_0.58_)(Fe^2+^_1.87_Mg_0.16_)(Al^3+^_0.72_Fe^3+^_0.28_)(P_1.01_O_4_)_3_ ; Grey phase. Bright phase is arrojadite-(BaNa).
